description: Three classifiers, each trained on two AI generators + all human texts (leave-one-generator-out). The third generator is held out from training and only seen at test time.
key_findings: Adding a second training generator boosts accuracy on the held-out DeepSeek from 0.825 (GPT-only) to 0.945 (GPT+Gemini) — a 12 percentage point improvement.
Only the GPT+Gemini configuration shows a drop on unseen DeepSeek (0.945 vs baseline 0.99). The other two configurations almost match baseline performance.
Training diversity is the dominant factor in cross-generator generalization.
